stemHtml: The purpose of “engine trending” for a gas turbine engine is...

options.a: to test an aircraft's performance at various temperatures and seeing how it compares to the rest of the fleet.
options.b: to test a single specific engine parameter, such as spool-up time, and comparing that parameter to the expected value in the AFM.
options.c: to flight test the aircraft in high density altitude conditions and see if the engine is able to reach the expected limits in the documentation.
options.d: to measure and analyse the current engine parameters and performance so that the future life of the engine can be predicted.
